movies.overview: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters, and trials that stretch both his cunning and his humanity to the breaking point.
movies.tagline: Defy the gods.
movies.title: The Odyssey

movies.overview: After a criminal network kidnaps Wang Wei's daughter and the corrupt police refuse to assist him, Wei sets out on his own to locate her. Navin, a tenacious journalist whose wife has mysteriously vanished, is his only ally. In this explosive martial arts showdown, the unlikely duo fights the kidnappers ruthlessly driven by a furious vengeance.
movies.tagline: To save their loved ones, they will fight everyone.
movies.title: The Furious

movies.overview: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.
movies.tagline: Truth. Justice. Whatever.
movies.title: Supergirl

movies.overview: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, they have enlisted the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.
movies.tagline: If you're searching for new adventure, "this is the way."
movies.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu

movies.overview: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
movies.tagline: The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.
movies.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day

belongs_to_collection.name: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Collection

movies.original_title: 劇場版「鬼滅の刃」無限城編 第一章 猗窩座再来
movies.overview: The Demon Slayer Corps are drawn into the Infinity Castle, where Tanjiro, Nezuko, and the Hashira face terrifying Upper Rank demons in a desperate fight as the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji begins.
movies.tagline: It's time to have some fun.
movies.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle

movies.overview: A man takes justice into his own hands, hunting down criminals. His vigilante crusade makes him a social media star but puts him at odds with the local police chief.
movies.tagline: An action film inspired by real events.
movies.title: Citizen Vigilante

movies.overview: The "Supreme Invincible Cup" is about to begin, and a host of top teams are about to engage in an unprecedented showdown! But the Kung Fu Women's Soccer Team has been dealt a hellish script right from the start?! Their opponents are all highly skilled, and external pressure is mounting. The schemes on the field are one after another... Can they use their kung fu to turn the tide on the green field?

production_companies.name: Shanghai Maoyan Film 上海猫眼影业

movies.tagline: One kick can ignite the world.
movies.title: Kung Fu Soccer

movies.overview: The fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.
movies.tagline: Their fight. Our future.
movies.title: Mortal Kombat II

movies.overview: A nightclub owner is on the verge of leaving his dangerous past behind for retirement with his girlfriend. When masked gunmen rob him and he finds himself squeezed by ruthless cartels, a mysterious newcomer arrives with an interest in buying the business. With danger closing in from all sides, he must navigate a deadly web of deception, power, and survival  -  where escape may no longer be an option.
movies.tagline: The night life is dirty business.
movies.title: The Get Out

movies.overview: A grieving woman pushing her limits on a solo adventure in the Australian wild is ensnared in a twisted game with a cunning killer who thinks she's prey.
movies.tagline: Hunt. Survive.
movies.title: Apex

belongs_to_collection.name: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender Collection

movies.overview: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.
movies.tagline: The legacy reawakens.
movies.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender

movies.original_title: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War
movies.overview: Jack Ryan is reluctantly pulled back into espionage when an international covert mission unravels a deadly conspiracy. Racing against time, he joins CIA allies Mike November & James Greer and sharp MI6 officer Emma Marlowe to battle a rogue black-ops unit in a high-stakes, deeply personal fight.
movies.tagline: No operation stays dark forever.
movies.title: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War

movies.overview: A marine biologist is doing research on a fish farm when she encounters several strange occurrences. Along with the brutal deaths of two teenagers, all signs point to the deep fjord; can there be more to the depths than the eye can see?
movies.tagline: Only 5% of the ocean has been explored for a reason…
movies.title: Kraken

movies.overview: Through both her moments of fear and bravery, a woman discovers that embracing her vulnerabilities is as vital to her inner strength as facing challenges head-on.
movies.tagline: This GOLD is BLOODY bold
movies.title: Maa Inti Bangaram

movies.overview: As Frank Castle searches for meaning beyond revenge, an unexpected force pulls him back into the fight.
movies.tagline: Hey Frank.
movies.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill

movies.overview: Five years after the events of Jurassic World Dominion, covert operations expert Zora Bennett is contracted to lead a skilled team on a top-secret mission to secure genetic material from the world's three most massive dinosaurs. When Zora's operation intersects with a civilian family whose boating expedition was capsized, they all find themselves stranded on an island where they come face-to-face with a sinister, shocking discovery that's been hidden from the world for decades.
movies.tagline: A new era is born.
movies.title: Jurassic World Rebirth

movies.overview: Cast out from his clan, a young Predator finds an unlikely ally in a damaged android and embarks on a treacherous journey in search of the ultimate adversary.
movies.tagline: First hunt. Last chance.
movies.title: Predator: Badlands

movies.overview: Best friends and train stewardesses Tess and DeeDee trade their dreary shifts on the Stank Rail for the glitzy Glamazonian Express. However, when a catastrophic Stormaganza threatens to crash the high-speed train into Celebration, Florida, the duo in coach must join forces with the snobby first-class attendants, a hot but dimwitted co-conductor, and fabulous US President Judy Gagwell to save the day.
movies.tagline: The greatest trainwreck in herstory.
movies.title: Stop! That! Train!

movies.overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.
movies.tagline: All grit. No quit.
movies.title: War Machine

movies.overview: A former Secret Service agent grudgingly takes an assignment to protect a pop idol who's threatened by a crazed fan. At first, the safety-obsessed bodyguard and the self-indulgent diva totally clash. But before long, all that tension sparks fireworks of another sort, and the love-averse tough guy is torn between duty and romance.
movies.tagline: Never let her out of your sight. Never let your guard down. Never fall in love.
movies.title: The Bodyguard

movies.overview: In the remote South Korean village of Hope Harbor, police chief Bum-seok and officer Sung-ae are called to investigate a mysterious creature wreaking havoc on the community. But all is not as it seems, and perceptions can be misleading. What begins as ignorance plants the seed of disaster, escalating through human conflict into a tragedy of cosmic proportions.
movies.title: Hope

movies.overview: In a village that doesn't officially exist, a laborer's unmatched athletic talent becomes his weapon to fight for his people's right to be recognized.
movies.tagline: Hurt. Bruised. But not beaten.
movies.title: Peddi

movies.overview: Set more than a decade after the events of the first film, learn the story of the Sully family (Jake, Neytiri, and their kids), the trouble that follows them, the lengths they go to keep each other safe, the battles they fight to stay alive, and the tragedies they endure.
movies.tagline: Return to Pandora.
movies.title: Avatar: The Way of Water

movies.overview: An unassuming substitute sheriff with a troubled past responds to a bank robbery in a small, sleepy town and unknowingly uncovers something far more explosive.
movies.tagline: Small town. Big secret.
movies.title: Normal

movies.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

production_companies.name: iQIYI Pictures （重复 同 iQiyi Motion Pictures）

movies.tagline: He's training a new generation of law enforcers for a dangerous mission to save the world from ruthless criminals.
movies.title: The Shadow's Edge

movies.overview: A man living in self-imposed exile on a remote island rescues a young girl from a violent storm, setting off a chain of events that forces him out of seclusion to protect her from enemies tied to his past.
movies.tagline: Her safety. His mission.
movies.title: Shelter

movies.overview: Brandon Beckett and Agent Zero lead a rescue mission in Costa Verde when their friends are taken hostage.
movies.tagline: No flag, no backup, and no mercy.
movies.title: Sniper: No Nation

movies.overview: Peter Parker is unmasked and no longer able to separate his normal life from the high-stakes of being a super-hero. When he asks for help from Doctor Strange the stakes become even more dangerous, forcing him to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.
movies.tagline: The Multiverse unleashed.
movies.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home

movies.overview: A covert team of elite operatives are living in the shadows. When a ruthless despot steals a billion-dollar fortune, they're sent to take it back—an impossible heist that erupts into a deadly game of strategy, deception and survival.
movies.tagline: When billions get stolen, meet the pros who steal it back.
movies.title: In the Grey

movies.overview: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, Adam must join forces with his closest allies, Teela and Duncan/Man-At-Arms, and embrace his true destiny as He-Man — the most powerful man in the universe.
movies.tagline: Witness how he became He-Man.
movies.title: Masters of the Universe

movies.original_title: ゴールデンカムイ 網走監獄襲撃編
movies.overview: As each group pursues their mission, a fierce battle unfolds over the tattooed prisoners. Who is friend, and who is foe? The fight leads them all to Abashiri Prison, where Noppera-bo, the man who holds all the answers, is locked away...
movies.title: Golden Kamuy -The Abashiri Prison Raid-

movies.overview: Cobb, a skilled thief who commits corporate espionage by infiltrating the subconscious of his targets is offered a chance to regain his old life as payment for a task considered to be impossible: "inception", the implantation of another person's idea into a target's subconscious.
movies.tagline: Your mind is the scene of the crime.
movies.title: Inception

movies.overview: Dao Ma, the "second most wanted fugitive," is entrusted by his benefactor, the chief of Mo family clan, to take on a mysterious escort mission-escorting the "most wanted fugitive" to Chang'an.
movies.tagline: A grand martial arts feast is back!
movies.title: Blades of the Guardians

movies.overview: When an unexpected enemy emerges and threatens global safety and security, Nick Fury, director of the international peacekeeping agency known as S.H.I.E.L.D., finds himself in need of a team to pull the world back from the brink of disaster. Spanning the globe, a daring recruitment effort begins!
movies.tagline: Some assembly required.
movies.title: The Avengers

belongs_to_collection.name: The Fast and the Furious Collection

movies.overview: Over many missions and against impossible odds, Dom Toretto and his family have outsmarted, out-nerved and outdriven every foe in their path. Now, they confront the most lethal opponent they've ever faced: A terrifying threat emerging from the shadows of the past who's fueled by blood revenge, and who is determined to shatter this family and destroy everything—and everyone—that Dom loves, forever.
movies.tagline: The end of the road begins.
movies.title: Fast X

movies.overview: A dysfunctional couple head to a remote cabin to "reconnect", but each has secret intentions to kill the other.
movies.tagline: Breakups are all in the execution.
movies.title: Over Your Dead Body

movies.overview: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn’s full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters the Spider Society, a team of Spider-People charged with protecting the Multiverse's very existence. But when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders and must set out on his own to save those he loves most.
movies.tagline: It's how you wear the mask that matters.
movies.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse

movies.overview: Following the events of Captain America: Civil War, Peter Parker, with the help of his mentor Tony Stark, tries to balance his life as an ordinary high school student in Queens, New York City, with fighting crime as his superhero alter ego Spider-Man as a new threat, the Vulture, emerges.
movies.tagline: Homework can wait. The city can't.
movies.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming

movies.overview: Beloved heroes from three distinct universes are set on a deadly collision course and face an existential threat unlike anything they've ever encountered.
movies.title: Avengers: Doomsday

movies.overview: A special bond develops between plus-sized inflatable robot Baymax, and prodigy Hiro Hamada, who team up with a group of friends to form a band of high-tech heroes.
movies.tagline: Drop everything. Save the world.
movies.title: Big Hero 6

movies.overview: In Sword Art Online, the first full-dive VRMMO, dying in the game means dying in real life. Emirun and Rex, who knew each other before entering the game, reunite by chance and join forces to survive. After their team is slaughtered by the mysterious PK known as the Black Swordsman, the two resolve to become stronger. Determined to avenge their fallen comrades, they seek out the legendary swordswoman Asuna and begin an intense training regimen. In a deadly game where even fellow players can become enemies, what fate awaits them at the end of this journey?
movies.title: Unanswered//butterfly

movies.overview: In a city overrun by crime, government Agent Lily Chen is forced to choose between her duty and her family when her husband is kidnapped, and she’s blackmailed into assassinating high-level criminals to save him. As she delves deeper into the criminal underworld, Lily’s relentless pursuit of justice unravels a web of corruption, leading to a final, life-altering decision that will change her world forever.
movies.title: Infiltrate

movies.overview: When a former elite sniper is hunted down by the ruthless warlord who once held her captive, she must fight to the death to protect the daughter she has raised in hiding, on a remote Australian farm.
movies.tagline: She escaped her past. It hunted her down.
movies.title: Seven Snipers

movies.overview: After a catastrophic event leaves their bodies destroyed, Ne Zha and Ao Bing are granted a fragile second chance at life. As tensions rise between the dragon clans and celestial forces, the two must undergo a series of perilous trials that will test their bond, challenge their identities, and decide the fate of both mortals and immortals.
movies.tagline: Witness a hero reborn.
movies.title: Ne Zha 2

movies.overview: As the Avengers and their allies have continued to protect the world from threats too large for any one hero to handle, a new danger has emerged from the cosmic shadows: Thanos. A despot of intergalactic infamy, his goal is to collect all six Infinity Stones, artifacts of unimaginable power, and use them to inflict his twisted will on all of reality. Everything the Avengers have fought for has led up to this moment - the fate of Earth and existence itself has never been more uncertain.
movies.tagline: Destiny arrives all the same.
movies.title: Avengers: Infinity War

movies.overview: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime. With the help of Lt. Jim Gordon and District Attorney Harvey Dent, Batman sets out to dismantle the remaining criminal organizations that plague the streets. The partnership proves to be effective, but they soon find themselves prey to a reign of chaos unleashed by a rising criminal mastermind known to the terrified citizens of Gotham as the Joker.
movies.tagline: Welcome to a world without rules.
movies.title: The Dark Knight

movies.overview: When a reclusive survivalist and his daughter rescue a mysterious, wounded woman from a river, they become entangled in a deadly web of violence and revenge, forcing them to confront a brutal criminal to survive.
movies.tagline: It takes an awful lot to kill a person.
movies.title: Hunting Season

movies.overview: Ethan Hunt and team continue their search for the terrifying AI known as the Entity — which has infiltrated intelligence networks all over the globe — with the world's governments and a mysterious ghost from Hunt's past on their trail. Joined by new allies and armed with the means to shut the Entity down for good, Hunt is in a race against time to prevent the world as we know it from changing forever.
movies.tagline: Our lives are the sum of our choices.
movies.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning

movies.overview: A young Shaolin follower reunites with his discouraged brothers to form a soccer team using their martial art skills to their advantage.
movies.tagline: Get ready to kick some grass!
movies.title: Shaolin Soccer
